core_mechanism: an exact duality mapping two seemingly different descriptions of the same system onto each other by embedding both in a larger-symmetry parent model and inverting a characteristic scale parameter (strong<->weak, R -> 1/R inversion), where the dual description's effective interaction term is generated dynamically by summing over topological defect (vortex) configurations
brief_reason: The abstract establishes an equivalence between two models via embedding in a theory with enlarged gauge symmetry, relying on R -> 1/R inversion duality and an effective potential (superpotential) dynamically generated by vortices, which is a scale-inversion duality with a defect-generated dual interaction.
